sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuid (id UInt32, uuid UUID) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_uuid SET uuid = toUUID('d9b89c0a-bf1d-4eec-9a1b-802fe63bb0fa') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, uuid FROM test_uuid WHERE uuid = toUUID('61f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_uuid WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL;
